summary: Iteration 26 - LUCCCA Portion Engine Service Testing Complete. All 28 backend tests passed (100%). Verified: GET /api/portion-engine/schema returns version 1.0.0, 113 items, 14 categories. GET /api/portion-engine/items returns all 113 items with proper structure. Filter by category=protein returns ~54 items, filter by tag=beef works. GET /api/portion-engine/items/{item_id} returns correct item (protein_beef_tenderloin). GET /api/portion-engine/categories returns grouped categories with counts. POST /api/portion-engine/resolve with item_id returns correct banquet/restaurant portions. Buffet service_style prioritizes buffet_portion for carving items. Luxury tiers scale correctly: premium=1.15x, ultra=1.25x. Category inference returns estimated=true. POST /api/portion-engine/scale calculates total oz and lbs with overage. POST /api/portion-engine/buffet-replenishment returns pan counts, burn rates, additional pans needed. Override CRUD (create, list, resolve with override, delete) all working. POST /api/event-workflow/attach-menu auto-resolves portions from portion library when no explicit portion_size_oz given.
critical_code_review_comments: Portion library correctly seeded with 113 items across 14 categories
MongoDB indexes created for item_id, category, subcategory, service_style, tags
Override scoring system correctly prioritizes account_id > property_id > concept > event_type > luxury_tier
Luxury tier scaling correctly applies 1.15x for premium, 1.25x for ultra
Buffet portion prioritization works for carving station items
Category inference correctly flags results as estimated=true
Attach-menu endpoint correctly auto-resolves from portion library with portion_source field
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER26_ prefixed test data: overrides for account_001-004, event TEST_ITER26_Portion_Library_Test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified the new Portion Engine Service. Key endpoints: GET /api/portion-engine/schema (version 1.0.0, 113 items, 14 categories), GET /api/portion-engine/items (filter by category, subcategory, tag, search), GET /api/portion-engine/items/{item_id}, GET /api/portion-engine/categories (grouped with counts), POST /api/portion-engine/resolve (smart lookup with overrides, luxury tier scaling, category inference), POST /api/portion-engine/scale (guest count scaling with overage), POST /api/portion-engine/buffet-replenishment (pan counts, burn rates), POST/GET/DELETE /api/portion-engine/overrides (CRUD). Existing override for protein_beef_tenderloin with luxury_tier=premium exists in production data. Attach-menu endpoint auto-resolves from portion library with portion_source field (portion_library, bqt_standard, or explicit).

category_distribution.protein: 54 items (beef, chicken, pork, seafood, lamb, vegetarian)

verified_features.buffet_portion_prioritization: Buffet items use buffet_portion when available, fallback to banquet_portion
